items.summary: Create a backend Wand type with fields for id (Text), name (Text), owner (Principal), and createdAt (Int) timestamp
Implement backend functions to create a new wand, retrieve all wands for a user, retrieve a specific wand by id, update a wand's name, and delete a wand
Create a backend Friendship type and implement friend request system with functions to send friend requests, accept requests, reject requests, get pending requests, and get confirmed friends list
Implement backend function to retrieve wands belonging to a friend, returning wands only if a confirmed friendship exists between the caller and the wand owner
Create a MyWandsPage component displaying the authenticated user's wand collection with wand count, list of wands showing names, and buttons to add new wands, edit wand names, and delete wands
Create an AddWandForm component with a text input for wand name and submit button that calls the backend addWand function
Create a FriendsPage component displaying the user's friends list, pending friend requests, and a section to search and send friend requests to other users by their username or userId
Create a FriendWandsPage component that displays a friend's wand collection including their wand count and list of wand names, accessible by clicking on a friend from the FriendsPage
Update Layout component navigation to include links to My Wands and Friends pages, replacing or alongside existing marketplace navigation

Create React Query hooks for all wand-related operations (useMyWands, useAddWand, useUpdateWandName, useDeleteWand, useFriendWands) and friend-related operations (useFriends, usePendingRequests, useSendFriendRequest, useAcceptRequest, useRejectRequest)
Update App.tsx to include routes for MyWandsPage (/my-wands), FriendsPage (/friends), and FriendWandsPage (/friends/:userId/wands)

Design a magical wand-themed visual style with mystical aesthetics including deep woods colors (oak browns, ebony blacks, mahogany reds), starlight accents, and elegant serif typography that evokes a wand collector's aesthetic throughout the application
